[2026-03-28 03:04:06]
C:\Users\relmer\repos\relmer\TCDir\x64\Debug [master ≡]> .\TCDir.exe --set-aliases --whatif

  TCDir Alias Setup  (Whatif: preview only, no changes will be made)

  This wizard configures PowerShell aliases so you can invoke tcdir
  with short commands (e.g., 'd' instead of 'tcdir'). Aliases will be
  saved to your PowerShell profile and loaded automatically.

  Root alias name (1-4 chars) [d]: tc

  Select sub-aliases:
    [✓] tct  = tc --tree  (Tree view)
    [✓] tcw  = tc -w      (Wide format)
    [✓] tcd  = tc /a:d    (Directories only)
    [✓] tcs  = tc -s      (Recursive)
    [ ] tcsb = tc -s -b   (Recursive bare)


  Save aliases to: (Whatif: no changes will be written)
    ( ) $PROFILE.CurrentUserCurrentHost  (C:\Users\relmer\OneDrive - Microsoft\Documents\PowerShell\Microsoft.PowerShell_profile.ps1)
    ( ) $PROFILE.CurrentUserAllHosts     (C:\Users\relmer\OneDrive - Microsoft\Documents\PowerShell\profile.ps1) [has aliases]
    ( ) $PROFILE.AllUsersCurrentHost     (C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\Microsoft.PowerShell_profile.ps1)
    ( ) $PROFILE.AllUsersAllHosts        (C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\profile.ps1) [has aliases]
    (●) Current session only             (not persisted)



  Whatif: The following alias block would be written to console.

  ################################################################################
  #
  #  TCDir Aliases -- Generated by tcdir v5.2.1350
  #
  #  DO NOT EDIT: This block is managed by tcdir and will be replaced.
  #  Run 'tcdir --set-aliases' to reconfigure, '--remove-aliases' to remove.
  #
  ################################################################################

  function tc  { tcdir @args     }
  function tct { tc --tree @args }
  function tcw { tc -w @args     }
  function tcd { tc /a:d @args   }
  function tcs { tc -s @args     }

  ################################################################################
  #  End TCDir Aliases
  ################################################################################

  Whatif: No changes were made.
